history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A black-and-white nighttime street scene shows a person leaning beside a motorcycle on a sidewalk near a lit streetlamp.

The main subject is a person standing with their back and side turned to the camera, positioned in the foreground beside a motorcycle. Their face is partially turned away, with dark hair visible from the side, and they hold one hand up near their chest while the other hand rests near the motorcycle or their jacket. The person wears a dark leather jacket over a light top, loose dark jeans, and dark shoes.

Setting: The scene is outdoors at night, illuminated by a bright streetlamp directly behind and above the person, creating strong contrast and deep shadows. The background shows a wide street with painted lane markings, curb edges, and several tall palm trees and decorative plantings near the sidewalk. Concrete posts, a low barrier, and additional vehicles or objects are visible farther back. Hanging foliage or decorative garlands appear along the right side of the background near the buildings.

Visual Details: The motorcycle is dark with metallic chrome highlights, visible handlebars, and a front wheel turned slightly toward the camera. It rests on the sidewalk edge near the curb. The person’s jacket reflects the lamp light, showing a glossy texture, while their jeans hang in straight, relaxed folds. The camera angle is slightly low and close to the subject, with the motorcycle and the person dominating the lower half of the frame; the street and trees fill the upper background.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a person in a leather jacket standing beside a dark motorcycle at night. Streetlamp lighting and palm trees create a high-contrast, shadow-heavy background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, cinematic, medium shot of a young person with dark, tousled hair leaning against a vintage motorcycle at night. The person is wearing a classic black leather jacket unzipped over a white ribbed tank top, dark wash, wide-leg jeans, and dark boots. A silver chain dangles from their belt loop. They are looking down, with their hands tucked into their jacket, one hand adjusting the lapel and the other resting on their chest. The motorcycle is dark and appears to be a classic model with spoked wheels. The background is an urban street scene at night, with streetlights casting dramatic shadows. Palm trees are visible behind the person, and a pedestrian crossing with white stripes is in the background. The lighting is moody and atmospheric, with strong highlights from the streetlights and deep shadows that obscure details. The overall mood is cool, edgy, and slightly mysterious. The color palette is strictly black, white, and shades of gray. --ar 16:9 --style raw
